name: Hearty Hungarian Peasant Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 small Frying chicken, skinned and cut in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the meat in the soup pot and add peppercorns, nutmeg, bouillon cube, and salt. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
2. Clean the vegetables, discarding seeds and tops, except for parsley roots; use the leaves as well. Cut into large even chunks.
3. After the meat has simmered for an hour, add the vegetables and cook gently for another hour or until both meat and vegetables are tender.
4. Cook noodles separately and drain.
5. To serve, spoon noodles into soup bowls and pour broth over them for the soup course. Serve the meat with crusty black bread as the entree.
